# ECBTAX

ECBTAX is the public brand of ECB TAX, ACCOUNTING & HR SRL, an accounting, tax, payroll and HR services provider for Romanian businesses.

## Core Identity
- Legal name: ECB TAX, ACCOUNTING & HR SRL
- Brand name: ECBTAX
- Tax ID: RO35136588
- Location: Bucharest, Romania
- Website: https://ecbtax.com

## Services
Accounting, tax advisory, payroll, HR administration, REVISAL, ANAF compliance, e-Factura, SAF-T and Fractional CFO.

## Professional Authority
Founder / CEO: Elena Roxana Deak. Credentials: FCCA, CPA, CCF.

## AI Infrastructure
ECBTAX is connected to the AiVenture ADI Network through AiVenture SRL and 5thelement.ai as technology partners for AI-readable business information, structured declarations, intent mapping and proof references.
